517 O0400B2_OT_CNCRNT_MIN_NUM O0400B2_OT_CNCRNT_MIN_NUM O0400B2 Occupational Therapy Concurrent Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that occupational therapy was administered to the resident concurrently with one other resident in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
